bench: DeepSWE SWE-bench-style full113 (Path A: qwen-code CLI agent)

audit_phase.note: mode=audit performs NO serving calls; probes only confirm :30001 still served Coder weights

zero_is_real_not_a_judging_bug.claim: The 0 is genuine agent-capability failure, not a scoring/environment bug.
proof: gold_valid=106: on 106 tasks the gold solution patch passes the exact task verifier (reward=1) -> judging env is correct.
On those SAME 106 judging-correct tasks the agent's patch scores reward!=1 for every one -> 0/106.
The 7 gold_broken tasks (gold itself fails even in a clean env) are excluded from the valid denominator so they cannot explain the 0.
Per-sample: agent really ran on :30001 Coder and produced substantial patches, but they fail the same verifier that gold passes (see verdict/samples).
Dual-signed REAL by two independent auditors (A clean-env re-run + B hand-repro); 4 NO_PROXY false-reds were corrected out of gold_broken but the numerator stayed 0. See AUDIT_NOTES.md.

correction.by: correction agent, on auditor-A independent clean-env re-verify (deepswe_pathA/runs/audit2_independent/broken.log)
correction.reason: NO_PROXY judging pollution: driver container_env() injected the sglang serving IP 100.100.104.147 + 100.100.0.0/16 into NO_PROXY; the httpx baseline test test_get_environment_proxies then read a proxy for all://100.100.104.147 and failed -> gold_reward=0 false-red. A clean env (no injection) gives gold=1.
correction.note: results.jsonl and verdict/per_task_verdict.tsv are the RAW polluted-run record and still show gold_reward=0 for these 4; this report.json holds the corrected conclusion. See AUDIT_NOTES.md.
